utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format specifies 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each of them has detailed information: the health_coverage includes plan name, inclusions, exclusions, costs; property_coverage includes inclusions and costs; travel_coverage includes inclusions and costs; additional_services includes services and costs; total_budget includes monthly and annual totals and a comparison statement. All required details are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
1. The final coverage plan includes a health plan named 'Balanced Family Protection5 - Health (Physical & Mental)'. There is no exact match for this name in the ground-truth ratings, so we must infer which existing plan it most closely resembles based on its features and cost. It includes both physical and mental health coverage, telemedicine, preventive care, family therapy, psychiatry, stress management, crisis intervention, prescription coverage, and gym reimbursement. These features align with the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for both physical and mental health (each rated 8) because LifeFirst includes family therapy, preventive care, and telemedicine at a similar quality level (4-star, 8.x/10), and is moderately priced relative to premium plans.  
2. The property_coverage section mentions comprehensive home contents, art, jewelry, electronics, liability, and temporary accommodation — features that match 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' (rating 10) because it covers luxury possessions and provides concierge claim service for high-value items.
3. The travel_coverage includes business and leisure travel, medical evacuation, trip cancellation, baggage protection, emergency coordination, and accommodation upgrades — these features align with 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' (rating 10) as it is top-tier, covers both business and luxury travel, and includes premium accommodations.
4. The additional_services include concierge services, 24/7 assistance, priority claims handling, direct billing, multilingual support, app access, and wellness programs. These correspond most closely to 'Concierge Services' (rating 7) from travel_enhancement_services and 'Wellness Programs' (rating 9) from health_enhancement_services.
5. Therefore, the mapping of each item in the final plan to its rating is as follows.
